title: Test Article Delete Me (Edited)
summary: A throwaway test article for verifying site-tool.py
author: Jett Nguyen

title: My Workout App Didn't Know What I Should Lift. So I Built Something That Does.
summary: Every weekday, Jack's AI agent builds his workout from 60 days of training history, sleep, travel, and his golf schedule, then pushes it to his phone before he's out of bed. No mental math, no guessing what he lifted last week.
author: Jack Raney

title: I Got Socially Engineered by a Fake Google Call. My AI Agent Helped Me Stop What Came Next.
summary: A call from Google's real phone number talked Jack into handing over his Gmail account. Less than an hour later, his AI agent caught what he couldn't: hidden inbox filters, a planted passkey, and a backdoor built to survive a password reset.
author: Jack Raney
